svg.text: Current state + gaps for human-like self-conscious behavior
How the agent sees the world
What the agent remembers and retrieves
How the agent constructs its thinking frame
What the agent wants and why
How the agent decomposes and orders work
How the agent runs and coordinates
How the agent knows what worked
Deciding what to do without being told
Current: Reactive orchestrated automation with feedback
Target: Self-conscious agent with metacognition, curiosity, and learned behavior
The gap is not in execution — it's in self-awareness and autonomous initiative
